game.name: Legend of Elements
game.genre: Fantasy RPG with cultivation themes and action combat.
game.core_loop: Build class power through skills, spirits, gear, relics, mounts, and mode progression.
game.server_name_note: Main Discord/community server name is intentionally configurable and not finalized.

classes.swordsman_summary: Strong starter DPS class, excels at single-target fights (PvP and bosses), weaker AoE coverage versus multi-enemy PvE.

stats.speed_note: Speed is repeatedly emphasized as a top-impact stat for DPS builds.

realm_mode.name: Crafting Realm
realm_mode.purpose: Challenge mode used to obtain Crafting Gems for gear crafting.

realm_mode.name: Mount Realm
realm_mode.purpose: Mode used to obtain Soulvine to enhance mounts.

trial_mode.name: Trial Tower
trial_mode.purpose: Floor-based progression mode with ranking and rewards.

trial_mode.name: Arena
trial_mode.purpose: Ranked PvP mode under Trial Mode.

gameplay_modes.source_note: Names and short descriptions above are directly visible in provided screenshots.

build_systems.notes: These systems are visible from the provided UI screenshots and should be represented in future strategy channels and docs.
